subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath inhaled the fragrance of the Garment and hath turned toward the court of God, the Almighty, the Most Exalted, the Great [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن وجد نفحات القمیص و اقبل الی شطر الله المقتدر العلی العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @study; deepening, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
